method_summary: MDA (Mixture-Density Representation) predicts multiple depth hypotheses and their probabilities per pixel to address depth ambiguity at boundaries, extending naturally to transparent objects and sky regions.
key_innovation: Mixture-density representation that allows predicting multiple depth hypotheses per pixel instead of a single depth value.
title: Modeling Depth Ambiguity: A Mixture-Density Representation for Flying-Point-Free Depth Estimation
